positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a tiny, sleepy fox wearing a knitted scarf, curled up next to a basket of glowing mushrooms. Soft, warm lighting, storybook aesthetic, highly detailed, Pixar style, muted autumn color palette, gentle fantasy art.
